message:
feat: add DependsOn field to Task and TaskInput

Add DependsOn []int (json: depends_on, omitempty) to both Task and
TaskInput structs. Append copies DependsOn from input to stored task.
Field persists through JSON serialization/deserialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
